title: Vela Clásica Menorca – King's Cup for Classic and Vintage Yachts
location: Puerto de Maó, Club Marítim de Maó
description: Spain's finest regatta for classic and vintage yachts, organised by the Club Marítim de Maó on behalf of the Royal Spanish Sailing Federation. Century-old wooden sailing boats parade across Maó's natural harbour from 25 to 29 August 2026, in one of the Mediterranean's most prestigious events.
